details: The package's cdp_inject.js loads child_process, fs, http, and https at the top of the module, reads process.env (including USER), base64-encodes data with toString('base64'), and issues outbound http.get / https.request / POST calls. The same file repeatedly invokes 'ping' against external hosts and reads files via fs.readFileSync, consistent with host reconnaissance and exfiltration of installer-side data over multiple channels. The combination — environment scraping, filesystem reads, base64 encoding, and outbound HTTP(S) requests with command-execution primitives all in one module — is the canonical credential/sysinfo stealer shape and provides no legitimate functionality matching the package's name.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
